title: valerianoides glabra
intro: Valerianoides glabra, also known as smooth valerian, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat digestive issues, pain, and insomnia. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Valerianoides glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root for consumption, and is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
